collection.clue.coin_25cent_1792: Often turns up in desert pyramids and buried coin ruins.
collection.clue.coin_nickel_1792: Desert wells and smaller desert digs favor this mint.
collection.clue.coin_1cent_1789: Trail ruins and desert excavations both hide older pennies.
collection.clue.flint_arrowhead: Common in trail ruins and the shallow layers of badlands digs.
collection.clue.obsidian_arrowhead: Look for rarer trail-ruin finds and the deepest badlands caches.
collection.clue.bone_arrowhead: Badlands dig sites and common ruin layers preserve worked bone.
collection.clue.scarab_pendant: Warm ocean ruins and sun-baked desert caches hide these charms.
collection.clue.turquoise_ring: Search shoreline caches and desert pyramids for polished jewelry.
collection.clue.silver_locket: Cold ocean ruins and stranded shoreline relics are your best lead.
collection.clue.ammonite_fossil: Frozen fossil sites and cold ocean ruins keep the best shell layers.
collection.clue.amber_fossil: Look for resin-rich finds in frozen gravel beds and ancient ruin debris.
collection.clue.rib_fragment: Snowy dig sites and colder coastlines preserve larger bones.
collection.clue.jade_effigy: Jungle shrines and sunken ritual caches favor carved green stone.
collection.clue.sun_idol: Desert temples and vine-choked shrines both hide old solar charms.
collection.clue.obsidian_talisman: Rare ruin layers and deeper shrine chambers protect darker relics.
collection.journal.tooltip.summary: Use to open the collection journal.
collection.journal.tooltip.map: Sneak-use to receive today's clue map.
collection.journal.tooltip.trade: Buy clue maps from a Collector villager.
collection.journal.trade_required: Collector clues are now sold by Collector villagers.
collection.journal.map_missing: No matching clue site for %s could be found nearby.
collection.journal.map_complete: All collection sets are already complete.
collection.journal.screen.map_hint: Sneak-use the journal to receive a clue map.
collection.journal.screen.empty: No collection data is available yet.
collection.journal.screen.featured_bonus: Finish today's lead for a 5-emerald bonus.
collection.journal.book.index_body: This page lists every chapter in the Collector's Journal. Select a chapter on the right page to review its set, reward, and tracked finds.
collection.journal.book.set_body: This chapter records discoveries for %s. Complete the full set to receive the reward: %s.
collection.progress.milestone_one: Logged the first lead in %s and received new field supplies.
collection.progress.milestone_two: Tracked a second lead in %s and received a collector payment.
collection.progress.featured_bonus: Today's featured lead was %s, so you also received %s.
advancement.collection.first_discovery.d: Brush out your first collectible artifact.
Complete every collection set in the journal.
